forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the coast. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon, possibly severe with damaging winds and large hail. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the eastern border, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning, possibly severe with damaging winds and large hail on and east of the ranges. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog south of Streaky Bay in the early morning. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then becoming northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the west coast, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly during the morning then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Coober Pedy in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon, possibly severe with damaging winds and large hail south of Leigh Creek. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
